---
title: "Preparation: Final capstone demonstration"
labels: presentation, demo, capstone, required
---

**Final deliverable — Presentation preparation.**

As a student, I want to prepare my final demo so that I can clearly present my project, features, Insomnia tests, and interesting code.

### Tasks
- [ ] Practice running the website and API.
- [ ] Practice testing the API in Insomnia.
- [ ] Choose one interesting piece of code.
- [ ] Write a short explanation for the code.
- [ ] Prepare demo script.
- [ ] Practice the 10-minute demo at least once.

### Done when
- Website ordering process is ready to show
- Insomnia tests are ready to demonstrate
- One interesting piece of code is selected and explained
- Demo script is prepared
- Project runs without errors before presentation
